content:
- Executed task 07 in NOW EXECUTE mode: fixed a broken test import path in `src/ha/decide.rs` (`config::schema::*` types), then ran full verification gates.
- Verification results: `cargo check -q`, `cargo test ha::decide -- --nocapture`, `make check`, `make test`, `make test-bdd`, and `make lint` all passed.
- Updated task file status/checklists to done/passing, appended a Cargo-parallelism learning to `AGENTS.md`, and ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh` to move the queue forward.
- Next step before exiting was to commit all modified files (including `.ralph` updates) with required `task finished 07-task-ha-decide-pure-matrix-idempotency-tests: ...` message.

- Read .ralph/current_tasks.md and identified all remaining <passes>false</passes> tasks.
- Applied required priority logic and story-chain constraint; selected the unblocked ultra_high task in story-rust-system-harness chain: task 10.
- Wrote selected path to .ralph/current_task.txt and will stop immediately.

- Started task 10 by reading `.ralph/current_task.txt`, then inspected task file and existing repo state.
- Confirmed `src/test_harness` does not exist yet; gathered context from `RUST_SYSTEM_HARNESS_PLAN.md`, `Cargo.toml`, `Makefile`, and worker contract/tests to make an execution-ready plan.
- Added `<execution_plan>` to task 10 with detailed module-by-module implementation steps, verification gates, and explicit `TO BE VERIFIED` marker at the end.
- Did not execute implementation yet by design; next pass should perform deep skeptical review of this plan, alter at least one part, and replace marker with `NOW EXECUTE` when satisfied.
